wordplay_note: Radio station manager in 1950s San Francisco
card_description: Bruce Stevens is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Broken Bubble*. Protagonist whose midlife crisis plays out against the bohemian youth culture. Name note: Radio station manager in 1950s San Francisco. The adult world failing to connect with the emerging counterculture. First appears in *The Broken Bubble*.

reference.brief: Protagonist whose midlife crisis plays out against the bohemian youth culture
reference.significance: The adult world failing to connect with the emerging counterculture
